transcript: Yeah, what do you want, mister? [exhale]
[laughing] Who is this? [indiscernible, to someone in background] Who the fuck is this?
Uh, the bringer of pain to your face. [exhale]
[laughing, to someone in background] Come here, Steve! [laughs] Who is this?
Hey, listen. I ain't jokin', dickface. [exhale]
Rather, my cleat... [exhale] ...has got a definite problem with your lip. [exhale]
[to woman in background] You know who it is?
Hey, put that lady on, mister.
Get her on the phone, mister.
You don't tell me fuckin' shit.
Yeah, my fists are gonna be telling you... well, you're gonna be in a world of pain, mister.
Hey, mister... [exhale] You know who you're talking to here?
I don't think you know who the fuck you're talking to, do you?
You're talking to Dirk Funk, mister. [exhale]
Your lip's gonna be in a definite funk after I'm done whippin' on it. [exhale]
Whoooa! Man, you're one bad motherfucker on the phone, ain't ya?
Nah, I'm gonna be one bad motherfucker... bad motherfucker when I hit you with a phone in the face, how's that sound?
Oh, you one badass motherfucker. Why don't you get your fuckin' ass down here, asshole?
'Cause I don't wanna beat up no children.
Put your fuckin' shit where it's at, asshole!
I've heard the word fuck one... way too many times.
You wanna play? Let's fuckin' dance, bitch!
I'm gonna hit you with a tennis racket... in the lip.
I'm gonna hit you with a thesaurus. You don't...
You think you're fuckin' bad, come on down, bitch!
I ain't got time to waste, I'm better than that. [exhale]
Yeah, you ain't got fuckin' time, but you got time to talk your shit on the phone? Well, bring your fuckin' ass down here!
So I can kick your fuckin' ass, you little prick!
You wanna play? Let's fuckin' play!
My cleats don't do no playing...
My cleats do the playin' on the soccer field.
Come on down, motherfucker! Come on, bitch!
Yeah, I'll be coming down, I'll be the only--
You're fuckin' bad you are on the phone, let's see how bad you are when you fuckin' get here, you little fuckin' asshole!
Hey, listen to me, man. I'll come down...
I don't gotta fuckin' listen to shit from you, man!
I'm... I'll be the only one leavin' if I come down, 'cause you're gonna be layin' on the fuckin' ground...
Oh, you ain't gonna be fuckin' leaving, bitch, except in a fuckin' ambulance, if that!
This is Charlie Keaton with the whippet puppy.
